text:
……お疲れ様。見事だったわ。
ロッドの扱いに関しては
もう免許皆伝といってもよさそう。

……よかったら
また時々確認させてほしい。
私も、励みになるから。

……それじゃ、私はこれで。
これからもロッドの習熟に
励

Welcome back. You showed great aptitude for
the Rod. It would be fair to call it... mastery.

I hope you would consent to me
inspecting your progress with it on
occasion. I believe it would encourage
me to redouble my own efforts.

I must go for now. But please... do continue
working on your training with the Rod.
